content:
Saturn in Cancer: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Saturn in Cancer blends the archetypal drive of Saturn (where you face discipline, responsibility, and long-term mastery) with the Water, cardinal nature of Cancer.

  • Planet: Saturn — structure, discipline, responsibility, limitation, mastery
  • Sign: Cancer (Water/Cardinal) — emotion, nurturing, home, protection, memory

Eastern Perspective
